item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining 1.72% on the day and a sharper 4.05% over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness has been marked by a stark imbalance in stock performance, with defensive stocks showing relative resilience while cyclical names have borne the brunt of selling pressure. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable decline in recent sessions, reflecting broader market pressures and sector-specific challenges. Despite pockets of strong performance, the small-cap segment has underperformed key benchmarks, with a significant majority of stocks in retreat and mixed technical outlooks across the board. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Broad Weakness as BSE Midcap Index Declines 1.04%
item.description: The BSE Midcap index experienced a modest decline of 1.04% on 4 March 2026, reflecting a cautious market sentiment amid mixed sectoral performances. Over the past five trading days, the mid-cap segment has also slipped by 0.2%, signalling a period of consolidation after recent gains. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks within the segment delivered notable returns, underscoring the varied dynamics at play. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Raghav Productivity Enhancers Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Raghav Productivity Enhancers Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 4 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 644.85, down 7.19% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting immediate selling pressure and subdued market sentiment within the Electrodes & Refractories industry. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: R Systems International Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amidst Price Pressure
item.description: R Systems International Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 4 Mar 2026, touching a new 52-week low of Rs 251 as the stock declined by 7.82% during the trading session, underperforming its sector and broader market indices amid sustained selling pressure. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: D.P. Abhushan Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amidst Price Pressure on 4 March 2026
item.description: D.P. Abhushan Ltd witnessed a significant intraday decline on 4 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,067.25, marking a 7.15% drop from the previous close. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting persistent selling pressure and subdued sentiment in the gems and jewellery segment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Shilchar Technologies Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Shilchar Technologies Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 3,700 as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader sector weakness and subdued market sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Lloyds Enterprises Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 Mar 2026
item.description: Lloyds Enterprises Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 4 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 45.17, down 8.99% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, continuing a four-day losing streak amid persistent selling pressure and subdued market sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Market Rally with 427.56% Half-Year Return
item.description: Covance Softsol has delivered an extraordinary return of 427.56% over the past six months, outpacing its peers and the broader market by a wide margin. This micro-cap software and consulting firm’s remarkable performance has been driven by a combination of strong financials, attractive valuation, and positive technical indicators, positioning it as a standout stock in a challenging market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Market Rally with Exceptional 8243% Return in One Year
item.description: Covance Softsol, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has delivered an extraordinary return of 8242.94% over the past year, vastly outperforming benchmark indices and peers. This remarkable surge has been driven by a combination of strong financials, attractive valuation, and positive technical signals, positioning the stock as a standout performer in a challenging market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Arex Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.113 Amidst Continued Underperformance
item.description: Arex Industries Ltd, a player in the Garments & Apparels sector, recorded a fresh 52-week low of Rs.113 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid persistent downward momentum and underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: IKIO Technologies Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of IKIO Technologies Ltd have declined to an all-time low, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. The stock’s recent price action underscores significant headwinds faced by the company within the Electronics & Appliances industry. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Keystone Realtors Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Keystone Realtors Ltd has reached an all-time low, closing near its 52-week bottom at Rs 400.45, marking a significant decline amid ongoing underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sai Life Sciences Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs.1014.4 on 4 Mar 2026
item.description: Sai Life Sciences Ltd has reached a significant milestone by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.1014.4, reflecting strong momentum in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector amid a mixed market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Shekhawati Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.12.07 Amidst Continued Weakness
item.description: Shekhawati Industries Ltd, a player in the Garments & Apparels sector, touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.12.07 today, marking a significant decline amid ongoing negative performance trends. The stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting persistent financial pressures and subdued operational metrics. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Yatra Online Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.35% Surge on 4 March 2026
item.description: Yatra Online Ltd demonstrated a robust intraday performance on 4 March 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 114.05, marking a 6.79% increase from its previous close. The stock closed the day with a notable gain of 7.35%, outperforming its sector and the broader market despite a gap down opening. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Keystone Realtors Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 Mar 2026
item.description: Keystone Realtors Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 4 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 401.05, down 7.62% from the previous close. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting immediate selling pressure and subdued market sentiment within the realty segment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Shanti Educational Initiatives Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Shares of Shanti Educational Initiatives Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 4 Mar 2026, hitting a day low of Rs. 184, down 7.51% from the previous close. Despite opening with a gap-up of 2.04%, the stock succumbed to selling pressure, closing the day with a steep decline of 7.77%, underperforming its sector and the broader market. Time: 2 hours ago
